changes_required: Keep hourly monitoring report separate from operator decision prompts.
Use mobile-readable semantic blocks instead of wide Markdown pipe tables.
Mandatory provider route fields: provider_checked, primary_provider, reserve_provider, selected_provider, reserve_used, reason, proof_file.
Every hourly report must include blocker and next action.
reason: Claude primary audit response was not available or proven in time; autonomous roadmap continued through explicit GPT reserve route.
